description: Product Description 12 Pairs Narrow Flat shoe laces The vibrant colors give you a happy mood and make you have different styles every day. They fit any type of laced shoes, such as casual shoes, athletic shoes, boots, skates, etc. Buyer Guidance Measure the length of your current shoelace, size of the eyelet, and aglet before purchasing the correct length of shoelaces for your shoes. Strong Shoelaces Polyester material, reusable and durable. The sides are wrapped with transparent plastic tubes, never crack and broken, you can reuse for a long time. Never Fade Our laces are dyed with the latest technology, you can soak and rinse repeatedly, our shoelaces will never fade.
